steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize how long the museum has existed. The notes give the exact founding year: 1992. The correct choice must include that specific year in a way that highlights duration.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices, confirm the match
steps.content:
Check each choice against the goal of emphasizing duration since founding:
  • Choice A — "The Pueblo of Zuni is home to the A:shiwi A:wan Museum and Heritage Center, which was founded by tribal members.": mentions the founding but omits the year entirely — no duration is conveyed. ✗
  • Choice B — "The A:shiwi A:wan Museum and Heritage Center has served the Pueblo of Zuni since 1992.": the phrase "has served...since 1992" directly highlights how long the museum has existed. ✓
  • Choice C — "According to its website, the A:shiwi A:wan Museum and Heritage Center (founded in the 1990s) works to "emphasize A:shiwi ways of knowing."": uses vague "1990s" rather than the exact year and shifts focus to the mission, not duration. ✗
  • Choice D — "Knowledge has been one of the central themes of the A:shiwi A:wan Museum and Heritage Center from its founding.": omits any date and focuses on theme, not duration. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
